# React References

Use this folder for React source material that should stay separate from curated
handbook notes.

## References

| Reference | Source | Local copy | License |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| React TypeScript Cheatsheet | <https://github.com/typescript-cheatsheets/react> | [react-typescript-cheatsheet](react-typescript-cheatsheet/README.md) | MIT license file included in the copied repo |
| React PDFs and notes | Local study-list import | [resources](resources/) | Review before committing or redistributing |

When useful, extract lessons from these sources into
`../README.md` or a focused note under `../`.
